title: Implement functional customer management page with add/edit form

requirements.text: Replace the placeholder CustomersPage with a functional customer management interface that displays a list of existing customers and provides an 'Add Customer' button to open a form dialog

quotes: customer management coming like this not able to add customer details

acceptanceCriteria: CustomersPage displays a grid or table of existing customers
An 'Add Customer' button is visible and opens a form dialog
The page follows the same layout pattern as InventoryPage and MenuPage

requirements.text: Create a CustomerForm component with fields for name, mobile number, email, reference source, preferences, and address, using react-hook-form for validation and state management
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required fields: name, mobile number, email, reference source, preferences, address
Form validates mobile number format and email format
Form uses the same styling and component patterns as IngredientForm and RecipeForm
Form submits customer data to backend via mutation

requirements.text: Add backend CRUD operations for customer management including addCustomer, updateCustomer, deleteCustomer, and getCustomers functions in the main actor
acceptanceCriteria: Customer type includes fields for id, name, mobile, email, referenceSource, preferences, address
addCustomer function creates a new customer and returns the customer with generated ID
updateCustomer function modifies an existing customer by ID
getCustomers function returns an array of all customers
All customer operations are session-protected like ingredient and recipe operations

requirements.text: Create a CustomerList component that displays customer cards in a grid layout showing name, mobile, email, and action buttons for editing
acceptanceCriteria: CustomerList fetches and displays all customers using React Query
Each customer card shows name, mobile, email prominently
Edit button opens the CustomerForm dialog with pre-filled data
Component follows the same pattern as IngredientList and RecipeList

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks for customer data fetching and mutations (useCustomers, useAddCustomer, useUpdateCustomer) in useQueries.ts
acceptanceCriteria: useCustomers hook fetches customer list from backend
useAddCustomer mutation creates a new customer and invalidates customer queries
useUpdateCustomer mutation updates existing customer and invalidates queries
Hooks follow the same pattern as existing ingredient and recipe hooks

constraints: Do not modify the backend session management or authentication logic
Follow the existing form component patterns from IngredientForm and RecipeForm
Use the same UI components and styling approach as other management pages
Maintain consistency with the white and green color scheme
nonGoals: Linking customers to sales or subscriptions
